/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--start-group /home/phuc/Project/smart-water-flow-pressure-monitor/2.firmware/build/src/core/libcore.a /home/phuc/Project/smart-water-flow-pressure-monitor/2.firmware/build/src/platform/linux/libplatform_linux.a -Wl,--end-group CMakeFiles/test_simulation_harness.dir/test_simulation_harness.c.o -o test_simulation_harness  ../src/simulation/libsimulation.a ../src/platform/linux/libplatform_linux.a ../src/services/libservices.a ../src/infrastructure/libinfrastructure.a ../src/drivers/libdrivers.a ../src/core/libcore.a
